description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest and postgres:latest services. Define a before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, and cache the vendor/ruby directory. Add a rails job (default test stage) that executes bundle exec rake db:migrate, bundle exec rake db:seed and bundle exec rake test, with a DATABASE_URL variable pointing to the postgres service using the POSTGRES_DB variable. Add an rspec job (test stage) that runs rspec spec, and a rubocop job (test stage) that runs rubocop. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that sets environment to production, installs dpl via gem, and runs dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_KEY.
